Year: The year when the wait time data was recorded.
Half: The half of the year (H1 or H2) when the wait time data was recorded.
Minimum_Wait_Days: The minimum wait time in days for a virtual appointment during the specified period.
Maximum_Wait_Days: The maximum wait time in days for a virtual appointment during the specified period.
Average_Wait_Days: The average wait time in days for a virtual appointment during the specified period.
